name: tabtab
description: Minimal inline code completion for OpenAI-compatible and Anthropic-compatible APIs.

tabtab.maxTokens.description: Legacy alias for tabtab.maxOutputTokens when maxOutputTokens is not set.

tabtab.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay for automatic inline completions in milliseconds.

tabtab.maxPromptTokens.description: Maximum approximate prompt tokens. Budget is split as prefix 65%, suffix 20%, extra context 15%.

tabtab.maxOutputTokens.description: Maximum tokens generated for automatic inline completions.

tabtab.manualMaxOutputTokens.description: Maximum tokens generated for manually invoked inline completions.

tabtab.maxCompletionLines.description: Maximum number of lines returned for automatic inline completions.

tabtab.manualMaxCompletionLines.description: Maximum number of lines returned for manually invoked inline completions.

tabtab.maxRelatedFiles.description: Maximum related files or LSP snippets included as extra context.

tabtab.maxRelatedFileBytes.description: Maximum size in bytes for a related file considered as extra context.

tabtab.lspTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for definition/declaration context lookup in milliseconds.

tabtab.sendThinkingDisabled.description: Send thinking disabled on OpenAI-compatible completion requests when supported by the API.

tabtab.requestTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for each API request in milliseconds.
